'''''Galaxy of Fear: The Hunger''''' is the twelfth and final book in the young readers ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Fear]]'' series.

==Publisher's summary==
''A survey team crash-lands on an unknown planet. The planet is dark, and its fetid swamps are filled with flesh-eating flowers, fearsome swamp slugs, and deadly dragonsnakes. No one hears the survey team's distress signals. They are stranded.''

''Thirty years later, Zak and Tash Arranda and their uncle Hoole, with Boba Fett in hot pursuit, land on the planet. Descendants of the survey team—half-starved and crazed with strange fevers—are still alive. They call themselves the Children, and how they have survived is a mystery. Does the strange creature named Yoda have the answer?''

==Plot summary==
Evading pursuit by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], [[Mammon Hoole|Hoole]], [[Tash Arranda/Legends|Tash]], and [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak]] hitch a ride with a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] crew led by [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] to an uncharted [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where they can lie low. That world, [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]], is fraught with natural dangers – but it's the descendants of shipwrecked explorers who are the most unsettling. The small colony of [[The Children|Children]] – all gaunt adults – have turned to [[Cannibalism|cannibalism]], and they begin feasting on the smuggling crew. Compounding this danger, bounty hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] has tracked the Arrandas and Hoole to the [[Swamp/Legends|swamp]] planet. With the help of the mysterious [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], the off-worlders escape Dagobah along with the rehabilitating Children. 

==Continuity==
The Arrandas' adventures with Uncle [[Mammon Hoole|Hoole]] were described as beginning “over a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] ago,” which suggests that this book took place at least eighteen [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. But the epilogue had [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] contacting [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to pursue the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. This was too early to be the assignment seen in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] ([[1980]]), which took place in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="TERC" />
